examples: I even have a fortunetelling machine in my office; I'm an antique toy collector.
The witch had no need for fortunetelling games: She could create her own destiny.
I had no more belief in palm reading or fortunetelling, but all I could think about were the words from the woman with the missing teeth.
Epiphany, celebrated in January, helps wash sins away - in icy rivers and lakes - but not before another healthy dose of fortunetelling.
